Senior Experience Designer | Equal mix of creativity, positivity and empathy | Anthophile & Durian enthusiast 🌻🌷🌼

People in your network


Connect
About the job
About Us

At Officeworks we make bigger things happen. Our customers, our team, and our community are our heart and soul. And if our brilliant people have taught us anything, it is that we can do all kinds of incredible things, each and every day.

Fast paced. Innovative. Inspiring. With close to 10,000 team members and a national footprint of more than 173 retail stores Australia wide – we’re focused on delivering a wide range, low price and great service. We’re about inspiring new ideas and thinking outside the box. We’re about kicking goals, having a laugh and pushing each other. We are about being rewarded and supported. We’re about teaching a customer something new and supporting the community. We’re about making a difference.

About The Role

We are scaling our AI team and investing in building real-world AI capability. As part of this growth, we are seeking an experienced AI Integration Engineer to design and build the infrastructure and AI agents that enables AI-powered solutions to operate within real business environments.

This is a hands-on role focused on integrating and development of AI agents into production systems, building scalable infrastructure, and delivering practical solutions that create measurable business value. You’ll work in a small, highly collaborative engineering team to turn strategic ideas into working products.

Important: This role requires demonstrated professional (commercial) experience delivering systems in real business environments. MLOPS experience and working with Agents in commercial setting will be highly regarded. Candidates with only, self-taught, or side-project experience will not be considered, but we encourage people from startup in series B and C to apply.

What You’ll Do

 Build full-stack infrastructure for AI prototypes and MVPs (backend services, APIs, and front-end interfaces) 
 Develop APIs and integration layers connecting AI agents with internal systems, databases, and third-party services 
 Implement orchestration and communication across multiple AI agents 
 Design and deliver scalable, secure systems from prototype through to production 
 Collaborate closely with engineering and product stakeholders to deliver end-to-end AI solutions 
 Build AI agents in collaboration with our Agent engineer 
 Debug, optimise, and evolve prototypes into stable, production-ready systems 


About You

You are a hands-on engineer who enjoys solving real business problems and has a track record of delivering working systems in a professional environment.

Essential Experience

5+ years of professional (commercial) software engineering experience
Proven track record of delivering production-grade systems in real business environments
Strong full-stack development capability
Strong Python experience, plus JavaScript or TypeScript
Experience building APIs and integrating systems in production
Experience with relational and/or non-relational databases (Snowflake highly regarded)
Experience with modern front-end frameworks (React, Angular, or Vue)
Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS or Google Cloud


Nice To Have

Experience working with AI-enabled systems or data engineering pipelines
MLOPS
Experience in startup, scale-up, or innovation-driven environments
Experience with complex system integrations or platform-level engineering


Our culture

Benefits

If you’re searching for an organisation that’s truly committed to its people, where you can thrive in a culture of togetherness, then join Officeworks and let’s make bigger things happen – for all of us! We celebrate our teams’ uniqueness by offering genuine team member benefits to the Officeworks family:

 We’re all about giving you the flexibility you need to keep things balanced to suit your individual needs. 
 Enjoy generous discounts across Officeworks, Bunnings, Kmart, Target and the wider Wesfarmers brands. 
 Access to our Officeworks benefits program for exclusive discounts and perks across entertainment, travel, lifestyle, and health. 
 Our Growing Families Policy supports team members during the exciting and challenging times of expanding their family 
 We prioritise safety, mental health and wellbeing, offering access to our Employee Assistance Program (EAP) as well as other ongoing programs 
 OurFlexible Public Holidays Policy supports those who observe cultural or religious holidays different from the standard public holidays in Australia 
 Take advantage of outstanding learning and development programs to support your career growth 
 Explore fantastic career opportunities across the broader Wesfarmers Group. 


At Officeworks, we operate best when our team represents the communities we serve. We proudly commit to providing a safe and supportive work environment for our team. We encourage applications from all candidates of all ages, cultures (including Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples), people with disabilities, and the LGBTQI+ community.

rendered_markdown:
# David Cropper

**Target role:** AI Engineer

> Owner review required before any external use.

## Summary

AI Engineer with commercial technology experience since 2009 spanning software quality assurance, test automation, and Data Engineering, including 3.5 years of commercial enterprise Data Engineering experience, plus independent AI Engineering and portfolio development producing production-minded AI systems spanning retrieval-augmented generation, operational intelligence, explainable AI, and enterprise decision support.

## Summary themes (from Tailoring Plan)

- Python
- Snowflake

_Summary prose is copied from the career profile in Phase B; theme-guided rewriting is deferred to Phase C._

## Skills

### Emphasised

- Python (technical)
- Snowflake (technical)

### Additional

- FastAPI (technical)
- Docker (technical)
- OpenAI APIs (technical)
- PyTest (technical)
- Git (technical)
- SQL (technical)
- Apache NiFi (technical)
- LangChain (technical)
- ChromaDB (technical)
- Pandas (technical)
- OpenPyXL (technical)
- REST APIs (technical)
- Microsoft Fabric (technical)
- Databricks (technical)
- dbt (technical)
- Azure Data Factory (technical)
- Selenium WebDriver (technical)
- Jenkins (technical)
- Maven (technical)
- Cucumber (technical)
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (domain)
- Operational intelligence (domain)
- Explainable AI (domain)
- Enterprise decision support (domain)
- Data engineering (domain)
- Geospatial processing (domain)
- LLM application development (domain)
- Software quality assurance (domain)
- Test automation (domain)
- Architecture-first design (soft)
- Agile collaboration (soft)

## Projects

### Operational Intelligence Copilot

Domain-agnostic operational intelligence platform combining deterministic analytics with Large Language Model reasoning to analyse structured business data and generate explainable, evidence-backed executive insights.

**Technologies:** Python, FastAPI, OpenAI APIs, PyTest, Git

**Outcomes:**

- Produces evidence-backed executive reporting.
- Maintains decision traceability through explainable recommendations.

**Demonstrates:**

- Intelligent intent routing
- Dataset profiling
- Anomaly detection
- Regression-tested analytics workflows
- Explainable AI recommendations

### Governance-Aware Document Intelligence RAG

Enterprise retrieval-augmented generation platform supporting trustworthy AI responses over organisational knowledge.

**Technologies:** Python, FastAPI, Docker, LangChain, ChromaDB, OpenAI, PyTest, Git

**Outcomes:**

- Supports grounded responses over multi-format organisational documents.
- Provides evaluation, telemetry, and explainability controls.

**Demonstrates:**

- Multi-format document ingestion
- Embedding generation
- Retrieval orchestration
- Evaluation frameworks
- Grounding validation

### Public Holiday Entitlements Application

Business-rules platform combining geospatial processing and external APIs to determine Australian public-holiday entitlements.

**Technologies:** Python, REST APIs, Geospatial Processing, Git

**Outcomes:**

- Determines Australian public-holiday entitlements from location and rules.
- Produces compliance-oriented reporting.

**Demonstrates:**

- Geospatial logic
- Business rules
- API integration
- Compliance reporting

## Experience

### AI Engineer - Independent Research & Development — Chase Risk & Compliance

*2025-12 – Present* · `independent_engineering`

Melbourne, VIC

- Independently develops progressively more complex production-minded AI Engineering projects under a dedicated portfolio brand.
- Builds engineering capability across retrieval-augmented generation, operational intelligence, explainable AI, and enterprise decision-support project areas.
- Applies architecture-first engineering practices using Cursor, Git, and PyTest across the complete development lifecycle.

**Technologies:** Python, FastAPI, Docker, OpenAI APIs, Cursor, Git, PyTest

### AI Engineering Professional Development and Portfolio Development — Independent study

*2025-07 – 2025-11* · `professional_development`

Melbourne, VIC

- Made a deliberate pivot from Data Engineering to AI Engineering as the primary career focus.
- Undertook structured AI Engineering study.
- Developed progressively more sophisticated portfolio projects.
- Adopted increasingly production-oriented engineering practices, including testing, documentation, and milestone-driven development.

**Technologies:** Python, OpenAI APIs, LangChain, Git, PyTest

### Data Engineering Professional Development and Career Transition — Independent study

*2023-10 – 2025-06* · `professional_development`

Melbourne, VIC

- Began with a personal break following the nbn Australia role.
- Undertook structured upskilling in modern Data Engineering.
- Developed skills across contemporary data platforms and tools, including Microsoft Fabric, Databricks, Snowflake, dbt, and Azure Data Factory.
- Prepared for a return to Data Engineering work.

**Technologies:** Microsoft Fabric, Databricks, Snowflake, dbt, Azure Data Factory

### Data Engineer — nbn Australia

*2020-03 – 2023-10* · `employment`

- Developed enterprise data pipelines and operational reporting solutions.
- Performed SQL transformations and data validation.
- Worked in Agile teams supporting production systems.

**Technologies:** Python, SQL, Apache NiFi, Git, PyTest

## Certifications (profile baseline — not tailored)

- AWS Certified Developer - Associate (Amazon Web Services) — active
- Databricks Certified Data Engineer Professional (Databricks) — active

---

_Experience guidance: `master_cv_only`. This draft must not be submitted without owner review._
assumptions: Unsupported employer technology priorities (not used as summary themes or promoted skills): JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Angular, Vue, AWS.
Material-benefit gate was overridden by the caller; tailoring proceeds despite tier/next-action signals.
Phase B copies the career-profile summary without rewriting; theme-guided summary rewriting is deferred to Phase C.
Certifications are rendered as a fixed profile baseline (active credentials only, profile order). They are not TailoringPlan-tailored content.
